title: CERBON's API
description: A library mod for CERBON's Minecraft Mods
body:
This is a library mod for CERBON's Minecraft mods. It contains shared code between my mods and some other useful stuff. It's required for all my mods on Minecraft 1.20.1+. Take a look at my profile page to see all my mods.

# Need a Server?
[![BisectHosting Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CERBONs_Better_Totem_of_Undying/BH_CBTU_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/Cerbon)
